title: Blankpack Fabricated
description: Vanilla-friendly backpack mod with fully integrated UI, tiers, customization, and smart inventory management.
body:
Adds a customizable backpack with integrated inventory slots, smart item handling, and a clean UI that blends seamlessly with the vanilla Minecraft experience.Blankpack

Blankpack is a vanilla-friendly backpack mod designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft’s UI rather than a separate system.

Instead of opening a standalone screen, the backpack is fully integrated into existing inventories, blending seamlessly with vanilla interfaces like the player inventory, chests, crafting tables, furnaces, anvils, and more. The result is a clean, intuitive, and highly polished quality-of-life experience.

✨ Core Features

Integrated UI
The backpack slots are embedded directly into vanilla screens, keeping the interface familiar and immersive.

Dedicated Backpack Slot
A special equipment slot near the offhand is used exclusively for the backpack, keeping inventory management clean and organized.

Backpack Tiers
Progress through multiple backpack tiers, each offering more storage:

Iron Backpack – 18 slots

Gold Backpack – 36 slots

Diamond Backpack – 54 slots

Netherite Backpack – 54 slots + special properties

Backpack Customization
Backpacks can be dyed using vanilla Minecraft dyes, allowing players to personalize their look without any extra items or complex mechanics.

Netherite Backpack Perks
The Netherite backpack is fireproof and will not burn in lava or fire, keeping your items safe even in the worst situations.

Item Protection on Death
When you die, the backpack drops as a single item, preserving all of its contents. No item scattering, no losses, no stress.

3D Player Rendering
The backpack is rendered directly on the player model, visually matching the equipped tier.

Smart Shift-Click Behavior
Intelligent item transfer allows quick and efficient movement between inventory and backpack.

Vanilla-Friendly Design
No unnecessary complexity, no intrusive mechanics — everything feels like it belongs in Minecraft.

🎯 Why Blankpack?

Blankpack focuses on quality of life and UI integration rather than gimmicks. If you want extra storage that feels clean, immersive, and truly vanilla, this mod is built exactly for that purpose.

📦 Compatibility & Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.11

Loader: Fabric

Dependencies:

Fabric API

Architectury API

Blankpack is ideal for vanilla+, survival-focused modpacks, or any setup where UI consistency and polish matter.
